name: Papadakis Stuffed Grape Leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the grape leaves and remove stems.
2. In a large bowl, combine the lamb, onions, parsley, mint, pine nuts, lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, salt, and pepper. Mix well with hands.
3. Lay a grape leaf flat. Place about 3 ounces of the meat mixture in the center. Fold over the stem end, then fold over the sides. Roll up tightly to encase the filling completely. Repeat until all filling is used.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F. Arrange approximately 10 grape leaves at the bottom of a large baking dish.
5. Place the stuffed grape leaves in the dish so they are closely packed. Pour water around them and cover with more leaves if needed.
6. Bake for 1 hour, or until tender.
